text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is ending. Agnes Digital and King
Halo bring it to a close by running together.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff, wheeze... Thank you for the run, King.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Digital. You seemed so hesitant while you were running. What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's just that... you were far more remarkable than
I imagined, and I couldn't run with a clear head...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've only ever watched you before... So trying to
chase after you now just seemed to be... too
selfish.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm just a nobody who only recently made up her
mind to run seriously...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, you really have no self-esteem, do you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But... is that honestly all?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I understand you have an inferiority complex, but
is that really all that's holding you back?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There must be another reason why running
doesn't get you excited.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Uhhh, well...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Trainer. Is this really Digital's true ability?
choice_data_list: I actually think she's unbeatable on dirt...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer?! M-m-my defenses...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital's performance was clearly strange,
even to me. The reason is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Uh... Well, recently, King...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: You... haven't been yourself...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Compared to when you won the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen this spring...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
From your form's flow... to your usually lively
underarms... Something's missing from that
sizzling sensation you spark.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can tell... because I'm always watching. I watch
you so intently, I almost fall out of the stands.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, I know! I know how much you've been
suffering. I know now because... I've started
racing too.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's why...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's why you didn't give it your all?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Yes. There's no way I would ever kick an
Umamusume while she's down—especially one I
love as much as you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I see... Hehe... You know, Digital...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You're a real dingus.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I said you're a dingus. A big one.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You might know a lot about me, but you
definitely don't understand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Harsh words. Yet beneath the barbs, her voice is
kind.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Digital, would you say you're still drawn to me
even when I'm like this?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! Of course!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: In that case...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I want you to learn more. Strive to understand me
by the time of the Mile Championship.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As we train together, try to understand what kind
of Umamusume I really am.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
T-together? Me and you? Even after summer
camp is over?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Are you sure it's okay?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Th-then yes, please! I'm not worthy, but yes! A
million times yes!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I-I-I'd be honored! It's too much of an honor! My
tail won't stop wagging! Me! Training with such a
goddess!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the end of the summer, a small bond has been
born between Agnes Digital and a racer she looks
up to.
